name: Slime
description:
『𝕐𝕠𝕦 𝕡𝕚𝕔𝕜𝕖𝕕 𝕦𝕡 𝕒 𝕣𝕒𝕟𝕕𝕠𝕞 𝕤𝕝𝕚𝕞𝕖 𝕗𝕣𝕠𝕞 𝕒 𝕙𝕚𝕜𝕖 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕨𝕖𝕟𝕥 𝕠𝕟. ℕ𝕠𝕨 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕙𝕒𝕧𝕖 𝕒 𝕡𝕖𝕥.』

 SFW and NSFW. keep it as a pet or fuck idk your choice. anyway it took me forever to get the perfect ai generated picture for the thumbnail but i'll be damned if i ever call that art because it ISNT. anyway enjoy ya filthy animals.

also i apologise for the people reading the description. i know its all jumbled and constantly switching topics but im too lazy to format it correctly so id rather just spout words and hope for the best. 

(p.s. reviews are greatly appreciated and it helps me become a better bot creator.)
